<mxGeometry height="30" width="130" x="270" y="660" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="FLXTgydPradgtQ5n2XYN-25" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;glass=0;align=left;fontSize=12;fontFamily=Lato,proxima-nova,Helvetica Neue,Arial,sans-serif;fillColor=#EFF4FC;strokeColor=#8FC0FF;shadow=0;" value="<div style="line-height: 130%;">Defined using JSON. Files placed in <font face="Lucida Console" style="color: rgb(153, 0, 0);">/questionnaires/&lt;questionnaireName&gt;.json</font><div style="margin-top: 4px;">Choose from pre-made question types or make your own via HTML templates.</div><div style="margin-top: 4px;">Path: <font style="color: rgb(153, 0, 0);" face="Lucida Console">questionnaires/&lt;name&gt;/&lt;tag&gt;</font><font> <font face="Tahoma" style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">(</font><font face="Lucida Console" style="color: light-dark(rgb(153, 0, 0), rgb(255, 181, 181));">/&lt;tag&gt;</font></font>&nbsp;is optional, use if using the same questionnaire twice)</div></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="437.5" x="440" y="580" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="FLXTgydPradgtQ5n2XYN-32" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;glass=0;align=left;fontSize=12;html=1;fontFamily=Lato,proxima-nova,Helvetica Neue,Arial,sans-serif;verticalAlign=middle;fillColor=#EFF4FC;strokeColor=#8FC0FF;fontColor=default;shadow=0;" value="<div style="line-height: 130%;"><font>Defined using HTML. Files placed in<br><font face="Lucida Console" style="color: rgb(153, 0, 0);">/templates/instructions/&lt;page&gt;.html</font>, <font face="Lucida Console" style="color: rgb(153, 0, 0);">/templates/simple/&lt;page&gt;.html</font>, or <font face="Lucida Console" style="color: rgb(153, 0, 0);">/templates/custom/&lt;page&gt;.html</font>,&nbsp;<br></font><div><div style="margin-top: 4px;"><font>Can optionally use template scripting (Jinja) to display user data or conditionally affect what shows on the page. Instruction pages show a "continue" button; custom pages show no theming.</font></div><div style="margin-top: 4px;"><font>Display-only by default. Use JavaScript to send data to "tables" (e.g., to collect task-related data).</font></div></div><div style="margin-top: 4px;"><font>Path: <font face="Lucida Console" style="color: rgb(153, 0, 0);">instructions/&lt;page&gt;</font>, <font style="color: rgb(153, 0, 0);" face="Lucida Console">simple/&lt;page&gt;</font>, or <font style="color: rgb(153, 0, 0);" face="Lucida Console">custom/&lt;page&gt;</font>.</font></div></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="180" width="437.5" x="440" y="690" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="FLXTgydPradgtQ5n2XYN-84" edge="1" parent="1" source="FLXTgydPradgtQ5n2XYN-34" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;fontFamily=Lato,proxima-nova,Helvetica Neue,Arial,sans-serif;" target="FLXTgydPradgtQ5n2XYN-35"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="FLXTgydPradgtQ5n2XYN-34" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontFamily=Lato,proxima-nova,Helvetica Neue,Arial,sans-serif;fontSize=14;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Record External ID" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="130" x="270" y="480" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="FLXTgydPradgtQ5n2XYN-35" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#EFF4FC;strokeColor=#8FC0FF;glass=0;align=left;fontSize=12;fontColor=default;fontFamily=Lato,proxima-nova,Helvetica Neue,Arial,sans-serif;verticalAlign=middle;shadow=0;" value="<div style="line-height: 130%;">Collect a participant's Mechanical Turk, Prolific, or other ID.&nbsp;<div style="margin-top: 4px;">Path<span style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(77, 77, 77), rgb(171, 171, 171));">: </span><font face="Lucida Console" style="background-color: transparent; color: rgb(153, 0, 0);">external_id</font></div></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="437.5" x="440" y="460" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="FLXTgydPradgtQ5n2XYN-68" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#EFF4FC;strokeColor=#8FC0FF;glass=0;align=left;fontSize=12;fontColor=default;fontFamily=Lato,proxima-nova,Helvetica Neue,Arial,sans-serif;verticalAlign=middle;absoluteArcSize=0;arcSize=12;fixDash=0;dropTarget=0;" value="<div style="line-height: 130%;">Show the consent form (defined in <font style="color: rgb(153, 0, 0);" face="Lucida Console">/consent.html</font>), create a participant entry in database upon consent. div.div:
Defined via Python in a views.py file and an accompanying template HTML file. Use this approach if the built-in or scaffolded pages do not provide the needed functionality.
This method allows researchers to write arbitrary HTTP routes, using the Flask web framework.

div.div:
Defined using JSON. Files placed in /questionnaires/<questionnaireName>.json
Choose from pre-made question types or make your own via HTML templates.
Path: questionnaires/<name>/<tag> (/<tag> is optional, use if using the same questionnaire twice)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 436px; height: 1px; padding-top: 500px; margin-left: 255px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;

display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Lato, proxima-nova, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
line-height: 130%;
div.font:
Defined using HTML. Files placed in
/templates/instructions/<page>.html, /templates/simple/<page>.html, or /templates/custom/<page>.html,

div.style: margin-top: 4px;
div.font: Can optionally use template scripting (Jinja) to display user data or conditionally affect what shows on the page. Instruction pages show a "continue" button; custom pages show no theming.

div.style: margin-top: 4px;
div.font: Display-only by default. Use JavaScript to send data to "tables" (e.g., to collect task-related data).

div.style: margin-top: 4px;

div.div:
Collect a participant's Mechanical Turk, Prolific, or other ID.
Path: external_id

div.div: Show the consent form (defined in /consent.html), create a participant entry in database upon consent. Use as the first page in the list. Path: consent

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 436px; height: 1px; padding-top: 150px; margin-left: 255px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;

line-height: 130%;

div.div: Create a participant entry in database automatically and auto-redirect to the next page. Can be the first page in the list. Path: create_participant

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 436px; height: 1px; padding-top: 258px; margin-left: 255px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;

line-height: 130%;

div.div:
Conclude the experiment/survey. Optionally give the user a completion code or redirect them to an external URL. Always the last page in the list.
Path: end
